name: KS_PROJECT_COST
definition:
CREATE VIEW KS_PROJECT_COST AS
SELECT [MAMÜL KART TİPİ]
      ,[MAMÜL KODU]
      ,[MAMÜL AÇIKLAMASI]
      ,[MAMÜL AÇILIŞ TARİHİ]
      ,[SARF FİŞİ TARİHİ]
      ,[TURU]
      ,[HESAPLAMA_TARIHI]
      ,[ALT MALZEME KART TİPİ]
      ,[ALT MALZEME KODU]
      ,[ALT MALZEME AÇIKLAMASI]
      ,[MİKTAR]
      ,[BİRİM KODU]
      ,[SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI]
	  ,[MİKTAR] * [SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI] AS [SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI]
	  ,[ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI]
      ,[MİKTAR] * [ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI] AS [ORTALAMA TOPLAM FİYATI]
      ,[FATURA NO]
      ,[FATURA TARİHİ]
      ,[MÜŞTERİ KODU]
      ,[MÜŞTERİ UNVANI]
      ,[KDV HARİÇ SATIŞ RAKAMI]
      ,[KDV RAKAMI]
      ,[GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI]
	  ,[MİKTAR] * [GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI] AS [GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI]

      ,[GÜNCEL ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI]
	  ,[MİKTAR] * [GÜNCEL ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI] AS [GÜNCEL ORTALAMA TOPLAM FİYATI]

FROM (


SELECT 

CASE ITMM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'TM'
		WHEN 10 THEN 'HM'
		WHEN 11 THEN 'YM'
		WHEN 12 THEN 'MM'
		WHEN 13 THEN 'TK'
		WHEN 4 THEN 'SK'
ELSE '' END AS 'MAMÜL KART TİPİ',
ITMM.CODE 'MAMÜL KODU',
ITMM.NAME 'MAMÜL AÇIKLAMASI',
ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE 'MAMÜL AÇILIŞ TARİHİ' ,
QPRODUCT.DATE_ 'SARF FİŞİ TARİHİ' ,

'MALZEME KARTI' TURU,

CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) HESAPLAMA_TARIHI,


CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'TM'
		WHEN 10 THEN 'HM'
		WHEN 11 THEN 'YM'
		WHEN 12 THEN 'MM'
		WHEN 13 THEN 'TK'
		WHEN 4 THEN 'SK'
ELSE '' END AS 'ALT MALZEME KART TİPİ',
ITM.CODE 'ALT MALZEME KODU',
ITM.NAME 'ALT MALZEME AÇIKLAMASI',

(CASE WHEN UNTA.CONVFACT1 = 0 THEN (STL.AMNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2)) ELSE (STL.AMNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2 / UNTA.CONVFACT1 )) END) 'MİKTAR',
(SELECT TOP 1 UNL2.CODE FROM LG_123_ITMUNITA UNTA2 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNL2 ON UNL2.LOGICALREF=UNTA2.UNITLINEREF WHERE UNTA2.ITEMREF = ITM.LOGICALREF AND UNTA2.LINENR = 1 ORDER BY ORGLOGICREF DESC) 'BİRİM KODU',


CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 


ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)
--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)



WHEN 10 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 13 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 


END 'SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI',

--0 'SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 


WHEN 10 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 



WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubModPriceFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostModPriceFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 



WHEN 13 THEN 
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 

WHEN 4 THEN
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 




END 'ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI',

--0 'ORTALAMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

INVOICE.FICHENO 'FATURA NO', 
INVOICE.DATE_ 'FATURA TARİHİ',
CLCARD.CODE 'MÜŞTERİ KODU',
CLCARD.DEFINITION_ 'MÜŞTERİ UNVANI',
STLINE.VATMATRAH 'KDV HARİÇ SATIŞ RAKAMI',
STLINE.VATAMNT 'KDV RAKAMI',





CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 


ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)
--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)



WHEN 10 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 13 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 


END 'GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI',

--0 'SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 


WHEN 10 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 



WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubModPriceFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostModPriceFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 



WHEN 13 THEN 
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 

WHEN 4 THEN
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 


END 'GÜNCEL ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI'


--0 'GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI',
----0 'GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

--0 'GÜNCEL ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI'
----0 'GÜNCEL ORTALAMA TOPLAM FİYATI'


FROM LG_123_STCOMPLN STL WITH(NOLOCK)
	left outer JOIN LG_123_ITMCLSAS ITC WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITC.LOGICALREF=STL.STCREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITMM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITMM.LOGICALREF=STL.MAINCREF and Itmm.CARDTYPE=12
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITM.LOGICALREF=STL.STCREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNL WITH(NOLOCK) ON UNL.LOGICALREF=STL.UOMREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMUNITA UNTA WITH(NOLOCK) ON UNTA.ITEMREF = ITM.LOGICALREF AND STL.UOMREF = UNTA.UNITLINEREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_QPRODUCT QPRODUCT WITH(NOLOCK) ON QPRODUCT.ITEMREF = ITMM.LOGICALREF 

	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS_SALES WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS_SALES.CODE = ITMM.CODE + '-01'
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_STLINE STLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON STLINE.STOCKREF = ISNULL(ITEMS_SALES.LOGICALREF,ITMM.LOGICALREF) AND STLINE.TRCODE IN (7,8,9) AND STLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON STLINE.CLIENTREF = CLCARD.LOGICALREF 

	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_INVOICE INVOICE WITH(NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.LOGICALREF = STLINE.INVOICEREF

WHERE ITMM.CARDTYPE = 12 AND ITMM.CODE NOT LIKE '%-01'

UNION ALL

SELECT 

CASE ITMM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'TM'
		WHEN 10 THEN 'HM'
		WHEN 11 THEN 'YM'
		WHEN 12 THEN 'MM'
		WHEN 13 THEN 'TK'
		WHEN 4 THEN 'SK'
ELSE '' END AS 'MAMÜL KART TİPİ',
ITMM.CODE 'MAMÜL KODU',
ITMM.NAME 'MAMÜL AÇIKLAMASI',
ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE 'MAMÜL AÇILIŞ TARİHİ' ,
QPRODUCT.DATE_ 'SARF FİŞİ TARİHİ' ,

'SARF FİŞİ' TURU,

CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) HESAPLAMA_TARIHI,


CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 'TM'
		WHEN 10 THEN 'HM'
		WHEN 11 THEN 'YM'
		WHEN 12 THEN 'MM'
		WHEN 13 THEN 'TK'
		WHEN 4 THEN 'SK'
ELSE '' END AS 'ALT MALZEME KART TİPİ',
ITM.CODE 'ALT MALZEME KODU',
ITM.NAME 'ALT MALZEME AÇIKLAMASI',

(CASE WHEN UNTA.CONVFACT1 = 0 THEN (STLINE_PRODUCTION.AMOUNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2)) ELSE (STLINE_PRODUCTION.AMOUNT * (UNTA.CONVFACT2 / UNTA.CONVFACT1 )) END) 'MİKTAR',
(SELECT TOP 1 UNL2.CODE FROM LG_123_ITMUNITA UNTA2 LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNL2 ON UNL2.LOGICALREF=UNTA2.UNITLINEREF WHERE UNTA2.ITEMREF = ITM.LOGICALREF AND UNTA2.LINENR = 1 ORDER BY ORGLOGICREF DESC) 'BİRİM KODU',


CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 


ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)
--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)



WHEN 10 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 13 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END)) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 


END 'SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI',

--0 'SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 


WHEN 10 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 



WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubModPriceFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostModPriceFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 



WHEN 13 THEN 
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 

WHEN 4 THEN
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,(CASE WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN INVOICE.DATE_ WHEN ISNULL(INVOICE.LOGICALREF,0) = 0 AND ISNULL(QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF,0) <> 0 THEN QPRODUCT.DATE_ ELSE ITMM.CAPIBLOCK_CREADEDDATE END))) 




END 'ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI',

--0 'ORTALAMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

INVOICE.FICHENO 'FATURA NO', 
INVOICE.DATE_ 'FATURA TARİHİ',
CLCARD.CODE 'MÜŞTERİ KODU',
CLCARD.DEFINITION_ 'MÜŞTERİ UNVANI',
STLINE.VATMATRAH 'KDV HARİÇ SATIŞ RAKAMI',
STLINE.VATAMNT 'KDV RAKAMI',





CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 


ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)
--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)



WHEN 10 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 13 THEN 

ISNULL(CASE 
	WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
		THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITM.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC)	
	
	ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
END ,0)

--(SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITM.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) 
--		AND DATE_ <= CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
--			ORDER BY DATE_ DESC)

WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 


END 'GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI',

--0 'SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

CASE ITM.CARDTYPE WHEN 1 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 


WHEN 10 THEN 

dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 



WHEN 11 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubModPriceFuncByDate(ITM.LOGICALREF,1,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 

WHEN 12 THEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostModPriceFuncByDate(ITMM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 



WHEN 13 THEN 
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 

WHEN 4 THEN
dbo.KS_ItemPriceMod(ITM.CODE,CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())) 


END 'GÜNCEL ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI'


--0 'GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA BİRİM FİYATI',
----0 'GÜNCEL SON SATINALMA TOPLAM FİYATI',

--0 'GÜNCEL ORTALAMA BİRİM FİYATI'
----0 'GÜNCEL ORTALAMA TOPLAM FİYATI'


FROM  LG_123_ITEMS ITMM WITH(NOLOCK) 
	INNER JOIN LG_123_01_QPRODUCT QPRODUCT WITH(NOLOCK) ON QPRODUCT.ITEMREF = ITMM.LOGICALREF 

	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_STLINE STLINE_PRODUCTION WITH(NOLOCK) ON STLINE_PRODUCTION.QPRODFCREF  = QPRODUCT.LOGICALREF AND STLINE_PRODUCTION.TRCODE = 12 


	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITM WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITM.LOGICALREF=STLINE_PRODUCTION.STOCKREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_UNITSETL UNL WITH(NOLOCK) ON UNL.LOGICALREF=STLINE_PRODUCTION.UOMREF
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITMUNITA UNTA WITH(NOLOCK) ON UNTA.ITEMREF = ITM.LOGICALREF AND STLINE_PRODUCTION.UOMREF = UNTA.UNITLINEREF
	

	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS_SALES WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS_SALES.CODE = ITMM.CODE + '-01'
	


	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_STLINE STLINE WITH(NOLOCK) ON STLINE.STOCKREF = ISNULL(ITEMS_SALES.LOGICALREF,ITMM.LOGICALREF) AND STLINE.TRCODE IN (7,8,9) AND STLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON STLINE.CLIENTREF = CLCARD.LOGICALREF 
	LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_01_INVOICE INVOICE WITH(NOLOCK) ON INVOICE.LOGICALREF = STLINE.INVOICEREF

WHERE ITMM.CARDTYPE = 12 





) AS TBL
